name: Chocolate Chip Orange Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup butter or margarine, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and sugar. Stir in nuts and 3/4 cup of the chocolate chips.
3. In a medium bowl, beat eggs with milk, orange juice, rind, and vanilla. Blend in butter or margarine.
4. Add egg mixture to flour mixture, mixing just until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Spread batter evenly in a greased, lightly floured 4 1/2 x 8 1/2 inch loaf pan. Sprinkle remaining chocolate chips on top.
6. Bake for 55-60 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted into the middle comes out clean. Cool in pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack and completing cooling before slicing.
